notes: CERTIFIED. Draft at /home/renaud/Ledger/Ledger_Spec_v12.0/ledger/drafts/sec_basis.tex passes all nine criteria. (1) Invariant B (inv:basis) with scope-closure well-definedness and C13; unreachability argued via parametricity for F :: forall b. Snapshot b -> r, bounded by the language-fragment proviso (Safe Haskell, nominal roles, no representation-exposing derivation) — the arbitrary pricing function is never opened. (2) Failure modes (a)/(b)/(c) worked with numbers, all arithmetic independently re-verified (100,000 / 102,000 / 70.8-vs-100 with D'=1.02); the phantom 200,000 is a type error at Tier 1 and Left BasisMismatch at the seam. (3) Architectural answer explicit: three-home model retained, one usBasis field in home 2, observation store named a projection; enforcement points = applyTx with three admission welds (tip, invariance, same-t_eff) and withSnapshot at the read seam. (4) Composition abstract (basis category + Composition Law proposition); order-sensitivity dissolved by the total effective order (t_eff, prec, bid); 49-vs-50 shown to be a non-arrow; undeclared equal-t_eff collisions refuse fail-closed. (5) Time travel: clone_at rebuilds usBasis (P8 extended); basis vs knowledge axes orthogonal; re-stamp events; tip-welded non-regression. (6) Late-notification as workflow: W1-W4 longtable with pending-transition. (7) Two-tier Haskell (GADT + skolem) with type role ... nominal on every basis-indexed carrier, closing the coerce forgery; presented as specification signatures, deliberately without a reference-code clearance remark. (8) CDM CA events mapped, pinned to v6.0.0 per Appendix F. (9) MODEL-FREE confirmed by mechanical scan (no pricing/vol model term; operators are declared data; split/divisor appear only as illustrations). All 20 cross-reference labels resolve in the bundle; all cited anchors (Ledger.hs:290-311, sec07 foldM replay, appD Cum/Ex/mQuoteEx/priceOf, sec05 PriceVec + three illegal states, sec15 P4/P6/P8/P21, sec01 unlabelled lifecycle value-invariance item) verified to match the draft's claims; house environments and \EUR exist in the preamble; sec_basis.tex confirmed not yet \input. PAGE-BUDGET TENSION FLAGGED, NOT RESOLVED: pdfinfo gives the current document exactly 155 pages; +~12pp moves it to ~167pp against the named sub-100-page aspiration — owner's call. The draft's eight enforceability/conformance flags (prec carrier, N_CA value, datum-kind universe, BasisError enumeration, CDM conformance demonstration vs v6.0.0 qualification functions, TA-BASIS detection procedure, toPrice/rounding carrier in ProductTerms, reference/Ledger.hs extension) are owner-routed residuals, not undischarged objections against the synthesis: in each case the design is fail-closed where the missing datum would be consulted, and grep confirms none of these carriers exist in the bundle yet, so the flags are accurate. One MEDIUM clarity note for the redline (non-blocking): the tip weld (lines 112-116) conditions on 'the boundary the transaction itself carries'; a transaction carrying SetBasis with no boundary leaves the condition vacuously unsatisfiable — add one sentence stating such a transaction is refused outright. Migration deliverables cited forward (P24 oracles in appB/appE, C13 in sec04, W2' writer row, usLastSettle re-typing) are correctly scoped to owning sections per the change log.
